jobs.description: We are seeking a skilled Shopify expert to assist in building and customizing our Shopify website. The ideal candidate will have experience in website design and product setup, ensuring an engaging and user-friendly online store. You will be responsible for customizing themes, setting up products, and optimizing the site for performance. If you have a keen eye for design and a strong understanding of e-commerce best practices, we'd love to hear from you!
jobs.title: Shopify Website Development and Customization

jobs.description: We are seeking a TikTok Shop Listing Optimization Specialist to enhance the performance of a single product listing. The goal is to improve visibility, search ranking, and conversion rate through strategic optimization aligned with TikTok Shop best practices. *Scope of Work:* * Optimize or rewrite a high-converting TikTok Shop product title * Create a compelling, conversion-focused product description * Identify and suggest relevant high-intent keywords for discoverability * Provide recommendations to improve product images and content presentation * Ensure listing is aligned with TikTok Shop ranking and conversion standards
jobs.title: TikTok Shop Listing Optimization Expert (Single Product Optimization)

jobs.description: We are looking to speak with customer support executives who have worked with Shopify-based e-commerce brands. This is a short research/interview project to understand how customer support works inside growing D2C/e-commerce brands, what tools teams use, what types of customer queries come in, and where support teams face the most repetitive or time-consuming work. Who we are looking for You should have hands-on experience in customer support for a Shopify/e-commerce brand, ideally handling queries related to: * Order status and delivery delays * Returns, refunds, and exchanges * Product questions * Payment issues * Cancellations * Damaged or missing items * Customer escalations * Support across email, chat, WhatsApp, Instagram, or helpdesk tools Experience with tools like Gorgias, Zendesk, Freshdesk, Intercom, Shopify Inbox, Reamaze, Richpanel, Tidio, or similar is a plus. What the project involves This will be a 30–45 minute video call where we ask you about: * Your typical customer support workflow * Types of queries you handled most often * Tools and processes used by the support team * Repetitive or annoying parts of the job * How escalations, refunds, returns, and delivery issues were handled * Where automation or AI could actually help support teams There is no preparation required. We are not asking you to install anything or do any customer support work for us. Requirements * Must have worked in customer support for at least one Shopify/e-commerce brand * Must be comfortable speaking about real support workflows * Must be able to join a video call * Strong English communication preferred Ideal fit You are a great fit if you have been on the front lines of customer support and can clearly explain what happens when customers message a brand, what makes the work difficult, and what support teams wish was easier.
jobs.title: Customer Support Executive for Shopify Brands

jobs.description: Job Description: We are building a premium e-commerce brand and already have a strong foundation in place — however, we are now looking for an exceptional Shopify developer to take our website to the next level. This is not a basic “upload products” or theme tweak role. We are looking for someone who can come in, assess our entire site, identify deficiencies, and implement strategic improvements across performance, UX, SEO, and conversion. You will be expected to think like a partner — not just a developer. About Us: We are a high-end interiors and finishes brand (tiles, stone, bathware, etc.) transitioning into a luxury, design-led online experience. Our goal is to create a best-in-class digital showroom — not just a standard e-commerce store. Website: repubblica.com.au What We Need You To Do: • Conduct a full audit of our Shopify site (UX, UI, speed, structure, SEO) • Identify gaps, inefficiencies, and missed opportunities • Benchmark against leading competitors (locally and globally) • Recommend and implement improvements to outperform them • Optimise product architecture, collections, and navigation • Improve site speed, performance, and technical SEO • Enhance conversion rates (CRO) through better UX and flows • Implement advanced Shopify customisations where required • Improve mobile experience significantly • Assist with scalable systems for product uploads and management • Integrate tools, apps, or custom solutions where needed Key Skills & Experience Required: • Advanced Shopify development (Liquid, theme customisation, Shopify Plus experience preferred) • Strong front-end skills (HTML, CSS, JavaScript) • Experience with custom Shopify builds (not just templates) • Proven experience improving conversion rates and UX • Strong understanding of e-commerce best practices • Experience with site speed optimisation and Core Web Vitals • SEO knowledge (technical + on-page structure) • Experience integrating third-party systems and APIs • Ability to analyse competitor websites and translate insights into action • Strong problem-solving ability and attention to detail What We’re Looking For: • Someone proactive — you identify problems before we do • Someone commercial — you understand what drives revenue • Someone with taste — this is a design-led, premium brand • Someone who can execute quickly and to a high standard • Someone who can grow with us long term To Apply: Please include: Examples of Shopify stores you’ve significantly improved (before/after if possible) A brief review of our website: repubblica.com.au – What are the top 3–5 issues you immediately see? – Where do you think we are underperforming? – What would you prioritise fixing first? Your approach to taking a “good” e-commerce site and making it exceptional Important: We are not looking for a low-cost option - we are looking for the right person. Low-effort, generic applications will not be considered. If you are confident in your ability to elevate a brand and build something best-in-class, we want to hear from you.
jobs.title: Senior Shopify Developer Needed for High-End E-Commerce Project

jobs.description: We are looking for an experienced Shopify Developer to help us build and customize our Shopify store. The ideal candidate should have strong experience in Shopify theme development, custom coding, and app integrations. The goal is to create a fast, responsive, and conversion-optimized Shopify store with a clean user experience. Responsibilities Develop and customize Shopify themes according to project requirements Implement custom sections, pages, and design changes Integrate third-party Shopify apps and APIs Optimize the store for speed, performance, and SEO Ensure the website is mobile-friendly and responsive Fix bugs and resolve technical issues Assist with Shopify store setup, product uploads, and configurations Required Skills Strong experience with Shopify & Shopify Liquid Proficiency in HTML, CSS, JavaScript Experience with Shopify theme customization Knowledge of Shopify apps and API integrations Understanding of eCommerce UX/UI and conversion optimization Nice to Have Experience with Shopify Plus Knowledge of SEO best practices Experience with Shopify fulfillment or third-party integrations Project Scope Shopify store setup / customization Theme modifications App integrations Performance optimization We are looking for someone who can communicate clearly, deliver quality work, and meet deadlines.
jobs.title: Shopify Developer Needed for Custom Store Development, Theme Customization & App Integration

jobs.description: We are seeking an experienced Senior Shopify Developer proficient in coding with Claude. The ideal candidate will have a proven track record of developing and customizing Shopify stores, integrating applications, and optimizing user experience. You will play a pivotal role in enhancing our eCommerce platform and ensuring seamless functionality. If you are passionate about driving online sales and have a deep understanding of Shopify's capabilities, we want to hear from you. Please DON'T apply if you aren't senior developer and aren't extremely good at coding on Shopify. Let's not waste each others time We build 100+ websites a year. So there is lots of potential for work for you Relevant Skills: #1 Being Extremely good at coding is the main task you will do. Everything else is secondary - Shopify development - Liquid templating language - HTML/CSS - JavaScript - E-commerce optimization - App integration - UI/UX design - Claude | AI Tell me your favorite food. Send 5 examples of work you have done on Shopify. If you directly email me or add me on social media your application will also get declined straight away. I get over 100+ Emails a week of pitches to work with me. If you use AI to reply to me. This isn't personal. I'm looking for personal touch If you have applied for job with me in the past let's not waste eachothers time. It would be nearly impossible for me to reconsider the application. There was reason it didn't go through. If you don't follow the above requests your application will be automatically declined without looking at it. Attention to detail is important to me. Cheers Clayton Bates
jobs.title: Senior Shopify AI Developer with Claude Coding Expertise

jobs.description: Job Description I am looking for an experienced Shopify expert / Shopify web designer to professionally organize and design my existing Shopify website. Most of my products are already uploaded into Shopify, but right now the site looks like a “warehouse” of products with no clear structure, categories, or professional layout. I need someone who can dress up the website, organize the products, and make it easy for customers to browse. I am not looking for someone to just upload products. The products are mostly already there. I need someone who understands Shopify structure, design, navigation, collections, catalog layout, quote cart/request-a-quote setup, and future e-commerce expansion. What I Need Done I need a Shopify expert who can: Organize my products into professional categories Main product categories Subcategories Collections Product filters if needed Easy navigation menu Create a clean, high-end layout I like a simple, clean, premium look similar to Apple’s website Not cluttered Easy to browse Mobile-friendly Professional homepage, collection pages, and product pages Set up the website as a catalog first Right now, I mainly want customers to view products and contact me I may not need full online checkout immediately I want the site built in a way that allows me to add online shopping later Add a quote cart / request-a-quote feature I want customers to be able to browse products and add items to a cart Instead of checking out and paying online right away, I want them to submit the cart to me for pricing I want to receive their selected items, quantities, color/options, business information, and shipping address This allows me to provide the best price, volume discount, package deal, or freight/shipping quote Quote request should collect Customer name Business name Phone number Email address Shipping address Products selected Product colors/options/variants Quantity for each item Notes or special requests Build the website for future expansion Today I sell one type of product In the future, I may add more product categories, such as shoes, furniture, accessories, or other items I need the Shopify structure to be flexible so I can easily add new categories later without rebuilding the whole website Prepare the site for future online sales Even if the website is catalog-only right now, I may want to sell selected products online later Please build the product, category, and collection structure in a way that can support e-commerce in the future Connect my domain My domain is currently with GoDaddy I need the freelancer to handle the final setup so customers can type in my domain and go directly to the Shopify site I do not want to figure out all the DNS/domain technical steps myself Set up customer contact options I want customers to be able to contact me easily from the website This may include call button, text message button, contact form, or chat feature I am also interested in possibly using AI/chatbot support in the future to answer basic customer questions before they reach me Important Requirements The right freelancer should understand: Shopify design Shopify collections Product organization Navigation menus Catalog-style websites Quote cart / request-a-quote features RFQ apps or custom quote form setup Clean premium branding Mobile-friendly layout Future e-commerce expansion GoDaddy domain connection Basic customer contact/chat setup Website Style I Like I want the site to feel: Clean Professional High-end Simple Easy to navigate Similar to the Apple website style Not crowded or messy I do not want the website to look like a warehouse, random product dump, or cheap online store.
jobs.title: Shopify Expert Needed to Organize Product Catalog Into Clean High-End Website

jobs.description: **Job Title: Shopify Store Designer for Unique Mattress Product** **Job Overview:** We are seeking a talented individual to assist in the development of a Shopify store dedicated to our innovative mattress product. The primary objective is to design an engaging and functional landing page that highlights the unique features of the mattress. **Key Responsibilities:** - Create a visually striking and user-friendly landing page for our Shopify store. - Emphasize the product’s unique qualities and benefits through effective design elements. - Ensure the website provides an optimal user experience that encourages high conversion rates. - Collaborate with our team to integrate branding and marketing strategies into the design. **Qualifications:** - Proven experience with Shopify platform and expertise in landing page design. - Strong understanding of user experience principles and conversion optimization strategies. - Excellent design skills with a keen eye for aesthetics and detail. If you are passionate about e-commerce and have a knack for creating stunning online experiences, we would love to hear from you!
jobs.title: Shopify Shop for Mattress Product

jobs.description: Hi, I’m looking for a designer to create a clean, high-converting landing page for an online aesthetic training course (exosomes). This is NOT a general website. It is a sales-focused landing page for paid traffic. I will provide the full structure and content. I need you to focus on creating a premium, clinical, and professional design in Figma. Design direction: * Clean and clinical (aesthetic/medical feel) * Soft, professional colours (white, light blue, neutral tones) * Not SaaS/tech style (no dark UI, no startup look) * Should feel trustworthy and suitable for practitioners Target audience: * Beauty therapists * Skin specialists * Medical professionals * Beginners entering aesthetics (India market first) Layout structure (please follow exactly): 1. Hero section * Headline + subheadline * 3 key bullet points * Primary CTA (Enrol in Training) * Secondary CTA (WhatsApp) 2. Why this matters / benefits * 3–4 icon-based benefit points 3. Who this is for * Card/grid layout (4 audience types) 4. What you’ll learn * Bullet list + CTA 5. Clinical / trust section * Clean text, subtle background 6. Results / progression section * Before/after style layout (clean and realistic) 7. Pricing section (very important) * Two pricing cards * One highlighted as “Most Popular” * Clear CTA buttons 8. What’s included * Bullet list 9. Future training section (short) 10. FAQ section * Accordion style 11. Final CTA section Important: * This page must be mobile-first * Clear spacing and hierarchy is very important * CTA buttons should be visible and repeated throughout * Design should not feel empty — slightly information-rich but still clean Process: I would like to start with just the hero section + first section to confirm design direction. Once approved, we will continue with the full page. Please share: 1. Examples of landing pages (not general websites) 2. Any experience with course / training / coaching pages 3. Confirmation you’re happy to start with a small test section first
jobs.title: High-Converting Landing Page Designer (Figma) for online course

jobs.description: We are an established e-commerce brand currently scaling our operations, and we’ve outgrown the basic limitations of our current Shopify theme. We aren’t looking for someone to just "install apps"—we need a developer who understands Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO) and clean coding. We need help with: Custom UI Development: Building bespoke Shopify sections and "hover-to-change" interactive elements that reflect our high-end brand identity. App Architecture: Managing our tech stack (specifically Subscriptions, Loyalty programs, and Email flows) to ensure they play nicely together without killing site speed. Store Audits: Regularly reviewing the site for technical friction points and performance bottlenecks. Proactive Problem Solving: We value a developer who says, "I know you asked for X, but if we do Y, it will improve your checkout flow by 10%." Who you are: You are Detail-Oriented and Committed to Quality. You don't send work over until it’s been tested across mobile and desktop. You are a Solution-Oriented thinker. When an app doesn't do exactly what we need, you can hop into the Liquid code and customize it. You are comfortable working asynchronously. We don't need you online 24/7, but we do need clear, concise updates on project status. Bonus points if: You have experience with apparel or high-growth consumer goods. You can provide detailed scoping and competitive price comparisons for project phases.
jobs.title: Shopify Technical Lead – Custom Liquid Development & Store Optimization

jobs.description: Hi, I’m looking for a web designer/developer to build a clean, minimal, and professional website for a marble, granite, and stone business. The website should look modern, premium, and easy to browse. I will provide reference websites, product photos, logo/brand details, and the product categories. Budget: $100 Please apply only if you can work within this budget or you can tell me how much it will cost. Website Pages Needed: 1. Home * Clean professional landing page * Premium stone/marble business feel * Simple intro section * Product/service highlight * Call-to-action button to contact us 2. About Us * Company introduction * Simple, trustworthy, professional layout 3. Services * Stone supply/import * Marble/granite product support * Project or client support section * Clean and simple design 4. Products * This is the most important section. * The product page should have around 5 main categories, for example: * Granite * Marble * Quartzite * Artificial / Nano Stone * Swimming Pool Stone / Outdoor Stone Each category should open to show the product variations. For example: * If the customer clicks Granite, they should see all granite variations. * Granite may have around 12 variations. * Other categories may have 2, 3, 4, or up to 18 variations. * Each variation should show a product image, product name, and clean product card/layout. * I will provide the photos for each variation. 5. Contact Us * Contact form * Phone number / LINE / WhatsApp / email section * Location or simple business details Main Requirements: * Clean, modern, minimal, professional design * Mobile responsive * Easy to edit/update later * Product category and variation layout must be clear * Product images should look organized and premium * Fast loading website * Please use WordPress, Wix, Shopify, Webflow, or any platform that is easy for me to manage later What I will provide: * Reference website examples * Logo / brand name * Product category names * Product photos * Product variation names * Contact details * Basic company information Important: The product section is very important. I want customers to easily click a product category like “Granite” and then see all the different granite designs/variations with pictures. Please send me examples of similar websites you have built, especially for construction, marble, granite, tiles, interior, architecture, or product catalog websites. Thank you.
jobs.title: Website

jobs.description: We are looking for an experienced Paid Media Account Manager to support a growing portfolio of ambitious brands across wellness, hospitality, lifestyle, food and luxury. This is not a junior media buying role. We are looking for someone who understands how to build and optimise growth-stage paid acquisition systems across Meta and Google, with strong commercial thinking, clear reporting habits, and a performance mindset. You will work alongside the founder as an extension of the agency, helping manage client accounts, optimise campaigns, build testing frameworks, and improve conversion performance. This is an ongoing freelance role with room to grow as the agency expands. Campaign objectives include: • Lead generation • E-commerce sales • Local bookings • Customer acquisition • Retargeting and conversion optimisation Responsibilities Meta Ads (Primary) • Campaign setup and management • Campaign restructuring where needed • Daily and weekly optimisation • Creative testing implementation • Audience testing and refinement • Retargeting strategy • Funnel analysis (TOF / MOF / BOF) • Budget allocation recommendations • Scaling winning campaigns Google Ads • Search campaign setup and optimisation • Performance Max management • Branded and non-branded campaigns • Keyword expansion and refinement • Conversion tracking checks • ROAS and CPA optimisation Reporting & Analysis • Weekly reporting summaries • Performance insights and recommendations • CAC, CPL, ROAS analysis • Funnel drop-off analysis • Clear identification of opportunities and blockers Tracking & Data • Strong understanding of Meta Pixel • Google Tag Manager understanding • GA4 confidence • UTM hygiene • Event tracking validation Requirements • Minimum 4+ years running paid media accounts • Strong Meta Ads Manager experience • Strong Google Ads experience • Proven growth-stage experience (not enterprise only) • Experience with e-commerce and lead generation • Comfortable working with smaller budgets and scaling efficiently • Strong analytical mindset • Strong English communication • Ability to work independently and proactively Ideal Experience Bonus if you have worked with: • Wellness brands • Hospitality brands • Luxury brands • Consumer products • Booking funnels • Shopify • HubSpot To Apply Please include: - Examples of accounts you have managed (Meta and/or Google) with brief performance results - Typical monthly ad budgets you have managed - Best campaign results (CPA, ROAS or CPL) - Industries you have strongest experience in - Your availability each week - Your preferred hourly or retainer rate Important: Please start your application with the words: Growth First This helps us filter genuine applicants.
jobs.title: Performance Marketing Specialist (Growth Stage Brands)

jobs.description: We are looking for a high-level Shopify expert to transform and optimize our website for conversion, automation, and scale. This is not a basic redesign. We are building a premium, high-performing digital experience for an audiobook product, and we need someone who understands UX psychology, funnels, and automation at an expert level. Scope of Work 1. Shopify UI/UX Overhaul (Conversion-Focused) -Redesign key pages (Home, Product, Landing Pages) -Improve user flow and storytelling experience -Optimize for mobile-first conversion -Implement high-end, modern UI (premium feel, cinematic tone) -Improve page speed and performance 2. Funnel Strategy & Implementation -Build high-converting funnels (landing pages + upsells) -Create: --Lead capture flows (email/SMS) --Tripwire / entry offers --Upsell + cross-sell logic --Integrate funnel tracking and analytics 3. Email & SMS Automation (Klaviyo or Similar) Set up full lifecycle automation: Welcome flows -Abandoned cart recovery -Post-purchase upsell flows -Re-engagement campaigns -Broadcast campaigns (email + SMS) Must include: -Copy strategy -Segmentation -Behavioral triggers -A/B testing 4. AI Agent Integration (Smart Assistant) Implement an AI-powered assistant on the site that can: -Answer product questions -Guide users through purchase decisions -Recommend content/products -Capture leads -Integrate with backend (CRM/email if needed) Bonus if you have experience with: -GPT-powered agents -Conversational commerce -AI-driven personalization Ideal Candidate You are NOT a generalist. You are: -A Shopify CRO expert -Strong in UX/UI design with a premium aesthetic -Experienced in funnel building and conversion optimization -Skilled in Klaviyo (or similar) automation -Experienced with AI tools / agents in eCommerce Provide pay and timeline.
jobs.title: Senior Shopify CRO + AI Automation Expert (UI/UX, Funnels, Email/SMS, AI Agent)

jobs.description: We are an eCommerce brand running on Shopify and are looking for a highly experienced Google Merchant Center (GMC) specialist to help us successfully set up, optimize, and get our account fully approved for Google Shopping and Performance Max campaigns. This is NOT a beginner task — we are specifically looking for someone who has repeatedly helped eCommerce stores get approved on Google Merchant Center, including navigating policy compliance and avoiding common pitfalls. 🎯 Scope of Work You will be responsible for: - Full setup and configuration of GMC account - Linking Shopify store correctly (feed setup & sync) - Ensuring compliance with all Google policies (including “hidden” issues that cause disapprovals) Reviewing and fixing: - Website trust signals (policies, structure, UX issues) - Product data/feed quality - Shipping, returns, and tax settings - Troubleshooting any disapprovals or suspensions - Ensuring products are fully approved and eligible for Shopping Ads - Advising on best practices for long-term account health ⚠️ Important Requirements (Read Carefully) We are ONLY looking for someone who: - Has proven experience getting GMC accounts approved for Shopify/eCommerce brands - Understands Google’s strict policies beyond just surface-level setup - Has handled account suspensions, misrepresentation issues, or policy violations before - Knows how to structure a store to pass GMC review successfully - Can identify and fix issues BEFORE submission (not trial-and-error) 📊 To Apply (Important) Please include: - Examples of GMC accounts you’ve successfully approved - A brief explanation of common reasons stores get suspended - Your process for ensuring a smooth approval (step-by-step) - Any results from Shopping Ads or Performance Max campaigns (optional but preferred)
jobs.title: Google Merchant Center (GMC) Expert Needed or Shopify Store

jobs.description: **Job Description: Marketing Specialist for Shopify Store** I am looking for a long-term Marketing & Growth Partner for my Shopify store. The store is built, and SEO/Image optimization is complete. I need a professional to handle the final "polish" and launch a multi-channel scaling strategy. We will work in the following milestones: Milestone 1 ($25): Final Store Audit & Tracking Setup. Verify all trust signals, badges, and ensure Meta/TikTok/Pinterest pixels are firing 100% accurately, including finalizing the store design, and getting the store polished and ready for better conversion. Milestone 2 ($25): Multi-Channel Campaign Launch. Build and launch ad sets on Meta, TikTok, and Pinterest + set up Email flows (Abandoned Cart/Welcome). Also start basic email marketing campaigns if possible by finding a good source to buy leads from and market to people. The email marketing should also be sustained in the following milestones. Milestone 3 ($25): Performance Optimization. Analyze initial data, A/B test creatives, and optimize for a target 2-3x ROAS. Ensure my spend on my ads targets the right people and we have a conversion rate of 3-4% as a long-term goal. Milestone 4 ($25): Scaling & Automation. Set up 1-2k/day email marketing sequences and scale winning ad sets. Also keep polishing store up, adding new products, finding consistently selling hero products and begin automation. Long-Term Incentive: I am looking for a partner/agency, not just a freelancer. Once we achieve consistent sales, I am offering a 10% commission on Net Sales for ongoing management, scaling, and weekly optimization consulting. I want a serious, committed person to work with me as a partner so that it is a growing opportunity with business potential. Also would be preferred if you have consistent experience or a team who I could consult regarding my business and if you were open to discussing other areas of growth so that we could get this up and running fast and optimized. Thanks!!!
jobs.title: E-commerce Growth Partner: Store Finalization, Multi-Channel Ads & Email Marketing

jobs.description: I’m looking for an experienced Shopify developer/designer to improve and optimise my clothing brand website. This is NOT just a visual redesign — I need someone to improve flow, fix issues, and increase conversions. Scope of work: - Fix all broken or missing links across the site - Improve user journey from homepage → product → checkout - Optimise product pages for higher conversion (layout, trust, clarity) - Improve mobile experience (this is priority) - Speed and performance improvements - Ensure branding is clean, minimal, and consistent with a premium streetwear feel Nice to have: - Experience working with fashion/streetwear brands - Understanding of CRO (conversion rate optimisation) - Ability to suggest improvements, not just follow instructions Please include: - Examples of Shopify stores you’ve improved - What you would improve on my current site (quick audit) This is for a brand called Bones The Label.
jobs.title: Redevelop website

jobs.description: We test new products on a regular basis and need a reliable Shopify builder who can create a fresh, fully functional store every few weeks. This is ongoing work, not a one-off project. We'll provide inspiration stores for each build, but we expect you to bring your own creative touch not just copy a template. The store needs to feel unique and professional. Every part of it must work flawlessly: checkout, payments, tracking pages, email notifications, mobile responsiveness all of it. We care a lot about conversions. You should understand what makes a good landing page, how to structure a product page that drives purchases, and how to reduce friction in the buying process. If CRO isn't something you think about naturally, this probably isn't the right fit. We're looking for someone with a strong portfolio of Shopify stores they've actually built (please share live links, not just screenshots). Experience with paid traffic landing pages (Meta, TikTok) is a plus, as is knowledge of upsell flows and post-purchase optimization. To apply, please include links to 2–3 Shopify stores you've built, a short note on what you'd prioritize to maximize conversions on a single-product store, and your typical turnaround time for a full build.
jobs.title: Shopify Store Builder Needed for Ongoing Product Testing (New Store Every Few Weeks)

jobs.description: We are seeking an experienced Shopify sales generation specialist to enhance our online store's performance through SEO and Google Ads strategies. The ideal candidate will have a solid background in the beauty industry and a proven track record of driving sales through effective digital marketing techniques. You will be responsible for optimizing product listings, managing ad campaigns, and analyzing performance metrics to ensure goals are met. If you are passionate about beauty and skilled in e-commerce marketing, we would love to hear from you!
jobs.title: Shopify Sales Generation Specialist for Beauty Industry

jobs.description: We are building a modern e-commerce brand that sells personalized greeting cards where users upload a photo, add a custom roast message, and we print and ship the card. We are looking for a Shopify + Customily designer/developer to build a clean, minimal, high-converting product page. The goal is to create a premium, Apple-style experience that is simple, fast, and product-focused. What We Need Built We want a single-page product experience where users can: Upload a photo of their loved one Customize the roast/message See a live preview of the card Place an order quickly (no friction) Design Style Very clean and minimal (Apple / Notion style) White background, strong typography (black/red) Product-focused (card is the hero) No clutter, no template-looking design Mobile-first (most users will be on phone) Key Features Integration with Customily (or similar product customizer) Live preview that updates as user edits Simple step-by-step flow (no multiple pages) Sticky product preview (ideal) Fast loading and smooth experience Clean checkout flow Tools / Platform Shopify (required) Customily (preferred) Experience with Printful or similar is a plus What We’re Looking For Strong Shopify experience (custom product pages, not just themes) Experience with Customily or product customization tools Clean, modern design style (minimal, premium) Understanding of conversion-focused UX (not just visual design) Mobile-first mindset Important We already have: Layout direction Design references Clear flow We need someone to execute this cleanly and professionally inside Shopify. To Apply, Please Include 2–3 examples of Shopify sites you’ve built (clean/minimal style preferred) Any experience with Customily or similar tools Your estimated hours + timeline Quick Question (required) How would you design a one-page flow where a user uploads a photo, customizes a product, and checks out without friction?
jobs.title: Shopify + Customily Expert Needed – One-Page Custom Card Builder UX

jobs.description: We are looking for a Creative Designer to join our e-commerce business and work closely with our team. This role is focused on creating clean, effective product creatives using Canva, combined with light product listing support. The listing process is largely automated, so your responsibility will mainly be checking, improving, and finalizing listings where needed. You should be fast, detail-oriented, and able to work independently. Strong communication and consistency are key. We work in a fast-moving environment where AI tools are heavily used, so being comfortable with new tools and adapting quickly is essential. Tools you will be working with: Shopify PhotoRoom Canva ChatGPT Higgsfield Winning Hunter Experience with these tools (or similar) is highly preferred. A few questions we would like you to answer: Do you have experience creating product creatives (preferably in Canva)? If yes, please explain what kind of creatives you have made. Do you have experience with product listing or working in e-commerce? If yes, please explain your role. To keep things structured and easy to review, please start your application with the words I am the one. Which of the following tools have you worked with: Shopify, PhotoRoom, Canva, ChatGPT, Higgsfield, Winning Hunter? Please explain your experience with each. How do you make sure your designs look clean, professional, and conversion-focused? How do you work with repetitive tasks while maintaining speed and quality? How many hours per week are you available currently? Are you open to scaling to a full-time role in the future? What is your desired monthly compensation? What were your previous roles? Are you currently working for another company? What is your WiFi speed and electricity reliability? Please keep in mind that this role is a strong opportunity to grow within a fast-scaling e-commerce environment and develop both personally and financially. We’ve been building and scaling for over a year and a half now, and we’re looking for someone who wants to grow with us long-term and take ownership of their role. We are serious about this job offer, and we care about you, your family, and your financial stability. We are looking for someone reliable, consistent, and motivated.
jobs.title: Creative Designer & Product Listing Support – Fast Growing E-commerce Brand

jobs.description: We are looking for a detail-oriented and reliable freelancer to assist with creating and optimizing product listings for our Shopify store. This role involves a combination of product data entry, AI-generated image creation, and SEO-focused content writing. The ideal candidate should have experience working with Shopify and a strong understanding of how to create high-converting product listings that are both visually appealing and optimized for search engines. Responsibilities: Create and upload product listings on Shopify Write SEO-optimized product titles and descriptions Generate high-quality AI product images (using tools like Higgsfield AI, Nano Banana, or similar) Ensure product information is accurate, consistent, and well-structured Optimize listings for better visibility and conversions Maintain proper formatting, tags, and categorization Requirements: Experience with Shopify product listings Basic knowledge of SEO (keywords, titles, descriptions) Familiarity with AI image generation tools Strong attention to detail and accuracy Ability to follow instructions and meet deadlines Nice to Have: Experience with product research Understanding of eCommerce trends Basic image editing skills Project Details: Ongoing work with potential long-term collaboration Flexible hours, but timely delivery is important Trial task may be required before hiring If you have the expertise and dedication to deliver high quality results, we would love to hear from you.
jobs.title: Shopify Listing Optimization Specialist | AI-Driven Visual Content & SEO Copywriting Expert

jobs.description: Job Title Shopify Expert: Figma-to-Shopify Build, Square POS Integration & Site Migration Project Overview We are looking for a highly skilled Shopify Web Developer to lead the transition of our current website to a new, custom Shopify store. We have a completed web design in Figma and need an expert to build this into a high-performing, SEO-optimized Shopify theme. A critical component of this project is the integration and synchronization of our Square POS (Squareup) inventory with Shopify. We are not using Squarespace; the candidate must have proven experience specifically with Square POS-to-Shopify syncing. Key Responsibilities & Scope Figma to Shopify Development: Build a custom Shopify store that matches our Figma designs with pixel-perfect accuracy. Content Migration: Recreate all existing pages from our current website on the new Shopify platform while maintaining design consistency. Square POS Integration: Set up a robust product syncing system between Square POS and Shopify to ensure inventory, pricing, and product details are mirrored correctly. Full Site Migration: Manage the technical migration from our current platform to Shopify, ensuring zero downtime and no loss of data. Performance Optimization: Ensure the site achieves high scores on Google PageSpeed Insights (mobile and desktop). SEO Setup: Implement SEO best practices, including 301 redirects, meta tags, and schema markup to preserve and improve current rankings. Post-Launch Support: Provide a 30-day follow-up period to monitor the migration, fix bugs, and ensure the Square sync is functioning perfectly. Technical Requirements Expertise in Liquid, HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript. Proven experience with Figma-to-Shopify workflows. Deep understanding of Square POS (Squareup) integrations (APIs or third-party connectors like SKU IQ or Matrixify). Experience with complex site migrations and handling 301 redirect maps. Strong knowledge of Shopify SEO and Core Web Vitals. Application Questions Can you provide 2–3 examples of Shopify stores you have built directly from a Figma design? Describe your experience with Square POS (not Squarespace) integrations. Which tools or methods do you prefer for syncing inventory? What is your process for ensuring a "clean" site migration that preserves SEO rankings? How do you approach Shopify page speed optimization without sacrificing design elements?
jobs.title: Shopify Website Developer

jobs.description: We are seeking a Shopify expert to implement anti-fraud measures and OTP verification to prevent fake orders. The focus is on enhancing security for our online store, specifically for use in Pakistan. The ideal candidate will have experience in Shopify and fraud prevention, ensuring our platform remains secure and reliable.(My Shopify store is currently experiencing a medium volium of spam/Fake Orders,I need a techinical expert to handle that issue.
jobs.title: Shopify Expert for Anti-Fraud/Spam/Fake Orders Measures

This role requires intermediate proficiency in Shopify Plus development and a strong understanding of web development, CSS, HTML, and JavaScript.

Strong attention to detail and a passion for food-related businesses are essential. If you have a portfolio demonstrating your previous Shopify projects, we'd love to see it!

The role involves identifying and resolving technical issues, ensuring smooth operation of the Shopify store and its integrated apps. Strong problem-solving skills and experience with Shopify's ecosystem are essential.
jobs.title: Shopify Expert for Troubleshooting

If you have a portfolio showcasing previous work in creating mega menus on Shopify, we would love to hear from you!
jobs.title: Shopify Developer Needed for Mega Menu Creation

jobs.description: Hey there! I'm on the hunt for a talented Shopify developer to help me build a website based on a reference I have. The goal is to set up a fully functional e-commerce site with all the features we need. If you’ve got experience with Shopify and know your way around e-commerce, I’d love to hear from you! When you reach out, please share your quote and an estimated timeline for getting this project done with some past website samples as well. Thanks! https://www.skazy.ai/ Regards MatrixLabs
jobs.title: Shopify Website Development

jobs.description: I run a dropshipping business and I need someone to take over launching products so I can focus on finding winners. This is NOT a VA role. Per product, you'll: Build the Shopify product page (images, copy, offer) Make product images with AI (copying competitor angles) Write copy that hits the right customer emotion — no generic fluff Find TikTok videos, edit them into ads Make AI video ads + static image ads Hand off ready to launch on Facebook Pace: 3–4 products/week. Faster is better. Don't apply if: you need hand-holding, you're slow, you can't show real work. Pay: Paid trial. We work side by side on the first products, then lock in rate. If we scale, you run ops. At $1M/month you're at $10k+/month. To apply: Start your message with "LAUNCH" Send 1 product page you built + 1 ad you wrote No "LAUNCH" or no examples = ignored.
jobs.title: Right-Hand Operator for Dropshipping Brand — Launch Products A-Z

jobs.description: I am the founder of MYLINEAGE LLC, a multi-brand apparel company operating three distinct brands under one Shopify store: KKE (Knockout Kings Elite) — boxing-inspired apparel BNBB (Bread and Butter Baby) — women's wellness activewear AND INC (Always Negotiating Dollars) — finance-themed apparel I have a fully documented step-by-step build guide covering every aspect of this store. You are not guessing at scope — you are executing a clear, detailed brief. SCOPE OF WORK: STEP 1 — Store Structure & Theme Shopify account configured (I provide login access) Shopify Payments activated with business credentials Dawn theme installed and configured Three brand collections with correct URL handles: /collections/kke, /collections/bnbb, /collections/and-inc Navigation menu, policy pages, and all store settings per my specification Custom domain connected STEP 2 — POD Connections & Product Catalog Printify and Printful installed and connected to Shopify 15 launch products created (5 per brand) — I provide exact specs, you build Products tagged correctly, SKU convention applied, shipping profile configured Printful branding options configured (inside label + pack-in card) STEP 3 — Shipping, Tax & Store Settings Shipping zones configured for US domestic NY state tax settings confirmed All policy pages live: Privacy, Terms, Refund, Shipping Email notification templates customized per brand STEP 4 — Klaviyo Email Flows Klaviyo installed and authenticated Three brand subscriber lists created Signup popup forms installed per brand collection Welcome Series, Abandoned Cart, Post-Purchase, and Win-Back flows installed All email copy provided by me — you install the structure STEP 5 — Google & Meta Technical Setup Google Merchant Center created and product feed synced GA4 conversion tracking verified Meta Pixel verified with all 5 events firing Custom Audiences built in Meta Ads Manager STEP 6 — SEO Technical Foundation Google Search Console verified, sitemap submitted Product images compressed to WebP SEO app installed, schema markup verified Three Shopify blogs created (one per brand) WHAT I PROVIDE: Complete build guide PDFs for every step Exact product list with specs, supplier names, and pricing All email copy — you install the flows, I write the words All brand assets: logos, color codes, design files Direct availability via Upwork messaging throughout NDA REQUIRED before any project materials are shared. Covers confidentiality, 24-month non-compete, and work-for-hire ownership of all deliverables by MYLINEAGE LLC. Do NOT send a generic proposal. Answer these questions or I will not respond: Q1 — Have you built a multi-brand POD store on Shopify before? Describe the collection structure. Q2 — Have you built Klaviyo automated flows — Welcome Series, Abandoned Cart, Post-Purchase? Describe one. Q3 — Have you configured Google Merchant Center and resolved feed disapprovals? What issues did you fix? Q4 — Are you willing to sign an NDA with a 24-month non-compete and work-for-hire clause? Yes or No.
jobs.title: Shopify Expert — Multi-Brand POD Store Build

jobs.description: I need help in eCommerce brands build high-converting Shopify stores and scale revenue through strategic Klaviyo email marketing. From custom theme development and UX optimization to automated flows and campaign setup, I focus on creating seamless customer experiences that drive sales. Skilled in Shopify Liquid, custom sections, performance optimization and Klaviyo flows like abandoned cart, welcome series and retention campaigns.

jobs.description: We are looking for a reliable and detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to support multiple growing e-commerce (dropshipping) stores. We are currently processing ~500 orders per day and scaling to 1000/day within the next 30 days, so this is a fast-paced environment with real responsibility. Experience is not the main priority... mindset is. You must be willing to learn, work hard, and take ownership. This role will be trained directly by me with the goal of growing into a Supply Chain Manager position across 4 stores. You will also work closely with our Customer Support Manager to improve systems, increase efficiency, and prevent problems before they happen. What you’ll do: Handle basic customer service (email communication) Communicate daily with suppliers Track and report issues (address errors, out of stock, delays) Monitor order processing times Check invoices and verify discounts Work with Shopify, Parcel Panel, Slack, and spreadsheets What matters: Strong attention to detail (no sloppy work) Clear and professional communication Willingness to learn fast and improve Able to handle responsibility and work independently This is a long-term opportunity inside a fast-growing e-commerce business. If you’re someone who wants to grow and take ownership, this is for you.
jobs.title: VA for Multiple Ecom Stores
